commandText: CREATE DATABASE [PixelzDb];
SELECT 1

CREATE TABLE [Customers] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [Email] nvarchar(320) NOT NULL,
    [FullName] nvarchar(255) NOT NULL,
    [Company] nvarchar(255) NULL,
    [Phone] nvarchar(50) NULL,
    [Status] tinyint NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Customers] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);

CREATE TABLE [OutboxMessages] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [EventType] nvarchar(255) NOT NULL,
    [Payload] nvarchar(max) NOT NULL,
    [Status] tinyint NOT NULL,
    [RetryCount] int NOT NULL,
    [MaxRetries] int NOT NULL,
    [NextRetryAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [ProcessedAt] datetime2 NULL,
    [ErrorMessage] nvarchar(2000) NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_OutboxMessages] PRIMARY KEY ([Id])
);

CREATE TABLE [Orders] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [OrderName] nvarchar(255) NOT NULL,
    [CustomerId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [Status] tinyint NOT NULL,
    [TotalAmount] decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
    [Currency] nvarchar(3) NOT NULL,
    [Description] nvarchar(1000) NULL,
    [InternalOrderId] nvarchar(100) NULL,
    [InvoiceId] nvarchar(100) NULL,
    [CheckedOutAt] datetime2 NULL,
    [RowVersion] rowversion NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Orders] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Orders_Customers_CustomerId] FOREIGN KEY ([CustomerId]) REFERENCES [Customers] ([Id]) ON DELETE NO ACTION
);

CREATE TABLE [OrderItems] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [OrderId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [ServiceType] nvarchar(100) NOT NULL,
    [Quantity] int NOT NULL,
    [UnitPrice] decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
    [Currency] nvarchar(3) NOT NULL,
    [Metadata] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_OrderItems] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_OrderItems_Orders_OrderId] FOREIGN KEY ([OrderId]) REFERENCES [Orders] ([Id]) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE [Payments] (
    [Id] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [OrderId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [CustomerId] uniqueidentifier NOT NULL,
    [Amount] decimal(18,2) NOT NULL,
    [Currency] nvarchar(3) NOT NULL,
    [Status] tinyint NOT NULL,
    [PspProvider] nvarchar(50) NOT NULL,
    [PspTransactionId] nvarchar(255) NULL,
    [PspRawResponse] nvarchar(max) NULL,
    [FailureReason] nvarchar(500) NULL,
    [IdempotencyKey] nvarchar(255) NOT NULL,
    [CreatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    [UpdatedAt] datetime2 NOT NULL,
    CONSTRAINT [PK_Payments] PRIMARY KEY ([Id]),
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Payments_Customers_CustomerId] FOREIGN KEY ([CustomerId]) REFERENCES [Customers] ([Id]) ON DELETE NO ACTION,
    CONSTRAINT [FK_Payments_Orders_OrderId] FOREIGN KEY ([OrderId]) REFERENCES [Orders] ([Id]) ON DELETE NO ACTION
);
CREATE INDEX [IX_Customers_Status] ON [Customers] ([Status]);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [UQ_Customers_Email] ON [Customers] ([Email]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_OrderItems_OrderId] ON [OrderItems] ([OrderId]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_Orders_CustomerId_Status] ON [Orders] ([CustomerId], [Status]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_Orders_OrderName] ON [Orders] ([OrderName]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_OutboxMessages_Status_NextRetry] ON [OutboxMessages] ([Status], [NextRetryAt]) WHERE [Status] IN (0, 3);
CREATE INDEX [IX_Payments_CustomerId] ON [Payments] ([CustomerId]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_Payments_OrderId] ON [Payments] ([OrderId]);
CREATE INDEX [IX_Payments_PspTransactionId] ON [Payments] ([PspTransactionId]);
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX [UQ_Payments_IdempotencyKey] ON [Payments] ([IdempotencyKey]);
